name: James J Ward | Fairway Home Mortgage Branch Manager
description_short: James Ward is a mortgage loan officer and Branch Manager at Fairway Home Mortgage in Houston, TX, serving Texas and Pennsylvania with 25+ years of lending experience.
description_long:
James Ward operates as Branch Manager at Fairway Home Mortgage's Houston location (Branch #3311-77098-200) and founder of The Ward Group. He has been providing mortgage financing guidance since 1999, accumulating over 25 years in the mortgage industry. His practice spans residential mortgage origination, brokerage, and lending services across Texas and Pennsylvania, with particular focus on the Houston and Pittsburgh markets.

The Ward Group specializes in a comprehensive range of mortgage products including jumbo and luxury home loans, VA and FHA loans, first-time homebuyer programs, relocation financing, new construction mortgages, renovation loans, investment property mortgages, and reverse mortgages (HECM) for seniors. They serve clients across Houston's affluent neighborhoods including River Oaks, West University, Memorial, The Woodlands, Katy, Sugar Land, Friendswood, and Pearland, as well as Pittsburgh communities such as Upper St. Clair, Wexford, Cranberry Township, Fox Chapel, Sewickley, and Mt. Lebanon.

Ward's practice is distinguished by his ranking in the Top 1% of Mortgage Originators in America and extensive documented client satisfaction. He has accumulated hundreds of verified 5-star reviews across Google, Zillow, and Experience.com. His client base includes executives, investors, families, and retirees. As Branch Manager and group leader, Ward collaborates with real estate agents, financial advisors, estate attorneys, and CPAs to deliver integrated mortgage solutions alongside wealth strategies.

The company positions itself as a guide through the mortgage process from application through closing and beyond, emphasizing service speed and competitive rates. Fairway Home Mortgage is identified as one of the nation's leading mortgage lenders. However, the website provides limited transparency regarding specific rates, fees, processing timelines, or regulatory compliance details beyond the NMLS number (168854).
pros: Top 1% ranking among mortgage originators nationally with documented client satisfaction
Hundreds of verified 5-star reviews across Google, Zillow, and Experience.com
25+ years of mortgage lending experience since 1999
Comprehensive product offerings including jumbo, VA, FHA, reverse mortgages, and investment property loans
Established relationships with real estate agents, financial advisors, estate attorneys, and CPAs
Serves both residential and commercial markets across Texas and Pennsylvania
NMLS-licensed (168854) operating under Fairway Home Mortgage, a nationally recognized lender
cons: Website lacks specific rate quotes, fee schedules, or APR ranges for informed comparison
Limited transparency on loan processing timelines, approval rates, or closing costs
No clear disclosure of whether rates/terms vary by credit score, loan amount, or geography
Marketing heavily emphasizes luxury/jumbo segments; positioning unclear for average-income borrowers
Website contains incomplete or placeholder content (e.g., 'title here', form submission errors)
best_for: Affluent homebuyers in Houston and Pittsburgh seeking jumbo and luxury home financing
Real estate investors and business professionals requiring investment property mortgages
First-time homebuyers and military personnel (VA/FHA loan specialists)
Retirees exploring reverse mortgage (HECM) options for wealth extraction
diagnosis: Best for affluent homebuyers, investors, and retirees in Houston and Pittsburgh seeking specialized mortgage expertise, particularly for jumbo loans, VA/FHA products, or reverse mortgages. Primary caveat: minimal pricing transparency and rate information available on the website; direct contact required for accurate quotes and comparison shopping.
